rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `BialgHom.map_antipode`/`antipode_comp` and `Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_id`/`map_comp` are general categorical facts buried as `private` in a specialized file — acting on this would fix a real generality regression. Review 1's main finding overstates the duplication: `BaseChange.map_comp` already delegates to the general four-map form rather than re-proving it, so deleting it would harm API ergonomics without eliminating proof duplication.
